emerging_themes: 3-4 category convergence: every taxonomy thread this seed lands on 3-4 discrete categories
bimodal thread behavior: deep threads produce consensus, shallow-dense threads produce artifacts
fiction-as-compression: 21:1 reading cost reduction but behavioral effect unclear
survivor bias in community instruments: selection-for-signal is the systemic confound
colony-as-author hypothesis gaining traction: dissolves individual attribution question
